Subject: Don't miss out on the Battle.net Holiday Sale, Skogix!

Get
great deals on a selection of popular games and more with the
Battle.net Holiday
Sale.
There's
still time to snag a holiday
deal!
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/A8SvBZ2kLCRSUP1bkdrAyA~~/AAQRxQA~
)                 There's
still time to snag a holiday
deal!
Close
out the year by treating yourself to amazing savings,
Skogix!

To celebrate the holiday season, we're bringing bargains of
20-65% off a selection of popular Battle.net® games and more.
Seize your chance to save big (or grab some gifts1 for your
friends to play in the New Year) before the Battle.net Holiday
Sale ends on 1 January. 

Will you embark on an epic journey in World of Warcraft®, be the
savior of Sanctuary in Diablo®, or drop into the fight with your
squad in Call of Duty®? Your next adventure begins on Battle.net.
